overview: Based on the published agenda, the Village of Kronenwetter Board was scheduled to meet on June 22, 2026, to address multiple items including operator licenses, budget amendments for a DPW truck purchase and a new parks committee, and approval of the village's 2025 compliance maintenance annual report. The meeting was also set to consider the creation of a special parks committee and review committee appointments.

agenda.item: Operator Bartender License - Tracy L. Rucinski
Operator Bartender License - Christine S. Beck
June 9, 2026 Special Village Board Meeting Minutes
May 2026 Check Register, ACH Register, and Credit Card Transactions Activity
Resolution 2026-008 Approving the Village's 2025 Compliance Maintenance Annual Report (CMAR)

Resolution 2026-010 Appointing Citizen Members and Trustees to Various Committees, Commissions and Boards
2026 Budget Amendment #1 – Financing for 2026 DPW Truck Purchase
2026 Budget Amendment #2 - Provide for 2026 Budget for Newly Created Special Parks Committee
Soli Sax Quartet Musician Contract for National Night Out

discussions.item: Operator Bartender License - Tracy L. Rucinski
discussions.body: The board was scheduled to consider and take possible action on a bartender operator license application for Tracy L. Rucinski.

discussions.item: Operator Bartender License - Christine S. Beck
discussions.body: The board was scheduled to consider and take possible action on a bartender operator license application for Christine S. Beck.

discussions.item: Resolution 2026-008 Approving the Village's 2025 Compliance Maintenance Annual Report (CMAR)
discussions.body: The board was set to consider a resolution approving the village's 2025 Compliance Maintenance Annual Report.

discussions.item: Resolution 2026-009 Creating a Special Parks Committee
discussions.body: The board was scheduled to consider a resolution to create a special parks committee for the village.

discussions.item: Resolution 2026-010 Appointing Citizen Members and Trustees to Various Committees, Commissions and Boards
discussions.body: The board was set to consider a resolution for appointing citizen members and trustees to various village committees, commissions, and boards.
The board was expected to consider and take possible action on an assessment and revaluation services agreement with a term extending through 2031.

discussions.item: 2026 Budget Amendment #1 – Financing for 2026 DPW Truck Purchase
discussions.body: The board was scheduled to consider a budget amendment to provide financing for a Department of Public Works truck purchase in 2026.

discussions.item: 2026 Budget Amendment #2 - Provide for 2026 Budget for Newly Created Special Parks Committee
discussions.body: The board was set to consider a budget amendment to allocate funding for the newly created special parks committee in 2026.

discussions.item: Soli Sax Quartet Musician Contract for National Night Out
discussions.body: The board was scheduled to consider and take possible action on a musician contract for the Soli Sax Quartet to perform at the village's National Night Out event.

publicComment: Public comment was on the agenda with a 15-minute time limit total and a three-minute time period per person, with time extension at the Chief Presiding Officer's discretion.
actionItems: Expected to vote on approving bartender operator licenses for Tracy L. Rucinski and Christine S. Beck
Scheduled to vote on Resolution 2026-008 approving the village's 2025 Compliance Maintenance Annual Report
Scheduled to vote on Resolution 2026-009 creating a special parks committee
Scheduled to vote on Resolution 2026-010 appointing citizen members and trustees to various committees, commissions, and boards
Expected to consider and vote on the Assessment/Revaluation Services Agreement through 2031
Expected to consider and vote on 2026 Budget Amendment #1 for DPW truck purchase financing
Expected to consider and vote on 2026 Budget Amendment #2 for special parks committee funding
Expected to consider and vote on the Soli Sax Quartet musician contract for National Night Out
Scheduled to convene closed session to discuss investigation record redactions pursuant to Wisconsin Public Records Law
title: Village Board Meeting - 2026-06-22
